Query.SQL: SELECT P.TRANSACTION_NUMBER AS "P.TRANSACTION_NUMBER", P.SUBJECT_NO AS "P.SUBJECT_NO", P.PAYMENT_FOR AS "P.PAYMENT_FOR", P.DATE_ENTERED AS "P.DATE_ENTERED", P.AMOUNT_CURRENCY AS "P.AMOUNT_CURRENCY", P.AMOUNT AS "P.AMOUNT", P.PAYMENT_TYPE AS "P.PAYMENT_TYPE", P.RETENTION_TYPE AS "P.RETENTION_TYPE", P.ERROR_INDICATOR AS "P.ERROR_INDICATOR", P.ADMIN_COURT_CODE AS "P.ADMIN_COURT_CODE", P.ENFORCEMENT_COURT_CODE AS "P.ENFORCEMENT_COURT_CODE", P.LODGMENT_NAME AS "P.LODGMENT_NAME", P.LODGMENT_PARTY_ROLE_CODE AS "P.LODGMENT_PARTY_ROLE_CODE", P.LODGMENT_CASE_PARTY_NO AS "P.LODGMENT_CASE_PARTY_NO", P.LODGMENT_ADDR1 AS "P.LODGMENT_ADDR1", P.LODGMENT_ADDR2 AS "P.LODGMENT_ADDR2" FROM PAYMENTS P WHERE P.ADMIN_COURT_CODE = ${param.courtId} AND P.RELATED_TRANSACTION_NUMBER IS NULL AND P.PAYOUT_DATE IS NULL AND P.PASSTHROUGH = 'N' AND P.RD_DATE IS NULL AND P.TRANSACTION_NUMBER = ${param.transactionNumber} AND P.ENFORCEMENT_PARENT = ${param.enforcementNumber} UNION SELECT P.TRANSACTION_NUMBER AS "P.TRANSACTION_NUMBER", P.SUBJECT_NO AS "P.SUBJECT_NO", P.PAYMENT_FOR AS "P.PAYMENT_FOR", P.DATE_ENTERED AS "P.DATE_ENTERED", P.AMOUNT_CURRENCY AS "P.AMOUNT_CURRENCY", P.AMOUNT AS "P.AMOUNT", P.PAYMENT_TYPE AS "P.PAYMENT_TYPE", P.RETENTION_TYPE AS "P.RETENTION_TYPE", P.ERROR_INDICATOR AS "P.ERROR_INDICATOR", P.ADMIN_COURT_CODE AS "P.ADMIN_COURT_CODE", P.ENFORCEMENT_COURT_CODE AS "P.ENFORCEMENT_COURT_CODE", P.LODGMENT_NAME AS "P.LODGMENT_NAME", P.LODGMENT_PARTY_ROLE_CODE AS "P.LODGMENT_PARTY_ROLE_CODE", P.LODGMENT_CASE_PARTY_NO AS "P.LODGMENT_CASE_PARTY_NO", P.LODGMENT_ADDR1 AS "P.LODGMENT_ADDR1", P.LODGMENT_ADDR2 AS "P.LODGMENT_ADDR2" FROM PAYMENTS P WHERE P.ADMIN_COURT_CODE = ${param.courtId} AND P.RELATED_TRANSACTION_NUMBER IS NULL AND P.PAYOUT_DATE IS NULL AND P.PASSTHROUGH = 'N' AND P.RD_DATE IS NULL AND P.TRANSACTION_NUMBER = ${param.transactionNumber} AND P.ENFORCEMENT_PARENT in ( SELECT AD.DEBT_CO_NUMBER FROM ALLOWED_DEBTS AD WHERE AD.DEBT_CASE_NUMBER = ${param.enforcementNumber} )
